description: hex stdb subcommand for running SQL queries and listing tables directly against SpacetimeDB without needing the nexus daemon

specs.description: SQL SELECT query returns pretty-printed table output
specs.given: SpacetimeDB is running at the default host and the 'hex' database has rows in the 'project' table
specs.when: hex stdb query 'SELECT * FROM project' is run
specs.then: Output is a formatted table with column headers and aligned rows, one row per result

specs.description: tables subcommand lists all tables in the database
specs.given: SpacetimeDB is running and the 'hex' database has multiple tables
specs.then: Output lists every table name, one per line

specs.given: SpacetimeDB is running with data in the 'swarm' table
specs.when: hex stdb query 'SELECT * FROM swarm' --json is run
specs.then: Output is valid JSON matching the SpacetimeDB SQL API schema+rows format

specs.given: SpacetimeDB is running with an 'inference-gateway' database
specs.when: hex stdb query 'SELECT * FROM inference_provider' --db inference-gateway is run
specs.then: Output shows rows from the inference-gateway database, not the default 'hex' database

specs.description: Unreachable SpacetimeDB shows a friendly error
specs.when: hex stdb query 'SELECT * FROM project' is run
specs.then: Prints 'Cannot reach SpacetimeDB at <host> — is it running?' and exits non-zero

specs.description: Invalid SQL returns the SpacetimeDB error message
specs.when: hex stdb query 'SELECT * FROM nonexistent_table' is run
specs.then: Prints the error message returned by SpacetimeDB and exits non-zero

specs.description: Query returning zero rows shows headers only with a zero-rows note
specs.given: SpacetimeDB is running and the 'swarm' table is empty
specs.when: hex stdb query 'SELECT * FROM swarm' is run
specs.then: Prints column headers and '(0 rows)' — does not error

specs.description: Does not require nexus daemon to be running
specs.given: hex-nexus daemon is stopped but SpacetimeDB is running
specs.when: hex stdb query 'SELECT * FROM project' is run
specs.then: Query succeeds — hex stdb connects directly to SpacetimeDB, not via nexus

specs.description: --count flag prints only the row count
specs.given: SpacetimeDB is running with 3 rows in the 'project' table
specs.when: hex stdb query 'SELECT * FROM project' --count is run

specs.description: Mutation SQL is rejected with a clear message
specs.when: hex stdb query 'DELETE FROM project' is run
specs.then: SpacetimeDB returns an error (SQL API is read-only); hex prints the error and exits non-zero

domain_conventions.readonly: SpacetimeDB SQL API only supports SELECT — mutations must go through reducers
